label: source_file
description: Source document filename or identifier used to trace extracted synthesis records.

label: material_name
description: Material name, sample label, or target product described in the synthesis workflow.

label: material_category
description: Material class such as oxide, carbon material, adsorbent, membrane, zeolite, MOF, or composite.

label: precursor
description: Main precursor or raw material used for synthesis. Preserve chemical names carefully.

label: solvent
description: Solvent, dispersant, or liquid medium used during preparation.

label: synthesis_method
description: Synthesis route such as hydrothermal, sol-gel, impregnation, precipitation, pyrolysis, or calcination.

label: synthesis_temperature_c
description: Main synthesis temperature in Celsius. Verify whether multiple stages are reported.

label: synthesis_time_h
description: Main synthesis duration in hours. Convert units only when unambiguous.

label: calcination_temperature_c
description: Calcination or heat-treatment temperature in Celsius when reported.

label: calcination_time_h
description: Calcination or heat-treatment duration in hours when reported.

label: atmosphere
description: Gas atmosphere or environment used during synthesis, drying, pyrolysis, or calcination.

label: ph
description: Solution pH or pH adjustment condition. Verify whether it is initial, final, or controlled pH.

label: template_agent
description: Template, surfactant, structure-directing agent, or additive used in synthesis.

label: drying_condition
description: Drying temperature, duration, and method if available.

label: surface_area_m2_g
description: BET surface area in m2/g. Verify measurement method and degassing conditions manually.

label: pore_volume_cm3_g
description: Pore volume in cm3/g. Confirm whether total, micro, or mesopore volume is reported.

label: particle_size_nm
description: Particle size in nanometers. Check whether the value is from microscopy, diffraction, or another method.

label: crystal_phase
description: Crystal phase or structural assignment. Verify with the stated characterization method.

label: characterization_methods
description: Characterization methods used to support material properties or structure.

label: target_application
description: Intended application such as catalysis, adsorption, separation, energy storage, or sensing.

label: notes
description: Short caveats about synthesis stages, uncertain units, or manual verification needs.
